findings.detail: Only one template choice, so it feels like I’m being handed a finished look instead of picking what fits my business.
findings.proposed_solution: Offer a few more template options so I can choose a style that feels like my business.

findings.detail: There are only three color palettes, which feels a bit limiting if I want the site to match my brand.
findings.proposed_solution: Add simple labels or helper text for the chat, save, and device toggle so I know what each one is for.

findings.detail: The chat box is visible, but it’s not obvious what I should ask it to do or whether it will actually help me change the site.
findings.proposed_solution: Provide a very short getting-started prompt like ‘Choose a template, then pick a color palette’ to reduce the blank-screen feeling.

findings.detail: The editor seems to work, but as a non-technical user I’d want clearer guidance on where to start and what each control does.
findings.proposed_solution: Show a clearer before/after preview when switching device views so I can tell what changed.

warnings.detail: Only one template choice, so it feels like I’m being handed a finished look instead of picking what fits my business.
There are only three color palettes, which feels a bit limiting if I want the site to match my brand.
The chat box is visible, but it’s not obvious what I should ask it to do or whether it will actually help me change the site.
The editor seems to work, but as a non-technical user I’d want clearer guidance on where to start and what each control does.
